title: You are very experienced lead generation manager. Your field is Financial Software Development. Your main customer acqui…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
You are very experienced lead generation manager. Your field is Financial Software Development. Your main customer acquisition channel is LinkedIn. Here is few words about company Elinext helps businesses and companies with the digital transformation of financial services by delivering best practices in fintech software development. Financial institutions have realized the importance of tech disruption reshaping the banking and payments industry.

Outsourcing software development is a really great way to improve operational efficiency and create a better customer experience, among other perks, for your clients in the financial domain at a reasonable price.

Elinext is a perfect combination of developers’ expertise and business-savvy management. That creates endless capabilities that enable your companies to leverage the wide technology stack to deliver customer products and services. You need prepare sequence of message to linkedin for decision maker that you are gonna target. Sequence have to consist of 5 message that you gonna send during 2 weeks

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Message 1: (Day 1)
Hello [Decision Maker],

I hope this message finds you well. I noticed that your company is in the financial services industry, and I wanted to introduce myself as a lead generation manager for Elinext. Our company specializes in fintech software development and provides businesses like yours with innovative solutions to transform the way you do business. Would you be interested in learning more about how Elinext can help your company achieve its digital transformation goals?

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Message 2: (Day 3)
Hello [Decision Maker],

I wanted to follow up on my previous message to see if you had an opportunity to check out Elinext's capabilities in fintech software development and digital transformation services. Our team of experts combines business acumen with technical expertise to deliver the best solutions to our clients. If you are interested in exploring how we could help your company enhance operational efficiency and improve customer experience, please let me know.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Message 3: (Day 6)
Hello [Decision Maker],

I was just wondering if you had any questions or concerns regarding our fintech software development and digital transformation services. We have helped many financial institutions who were grappling with the challenges of tech disruption in the banking and payments industry. Our team can offer you tailored solutions to address your unique business needs and goals. Please feel free to reach out if you would like to learn more.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Message 4: (Day 10)
Hello [Decision Maker],

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to share some success stories of Elinext's clients who were able to achieve digital transformation and operational efficiencies that translated into higher revenue and better customer experience. Our team of experts is committed to delivering innovative, cost-effective solutions that can boost your competitive edge in the market. Would you like to schedule a call to discuss your business needs and how Elinext can help you achieve your goals?

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Message 5: (Day 14)
Hello [Decision Maker],

I wanted to thank you for considering Elinext's fintech software development and digital transformation services for your company. We understand that choosing the right partner is critical to the success of your business, and we are committed to building a strong and lasting relationship with our clients. If you have any further questions or would like to learn more about Elinext's capabilities, please feel free to reach out. We look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

her more info about your company 25+ years experience
700+ developers
300+global clients
1,000+ custom software development projects
Strong expertise in software development for Healthcare and Financial companies.

We provide comprehensive Product Development Services and Solutions to S&P 500 companies, SMEs, and startups across the globe.

Founded in 1997, Elinext offers its clients proven expertise in designing and implementing solutions in ERP and Asset Management, CRM and Loyalty, IT Infrastructure Management, Document Management, Accounting, Banking, Healthcare, and IoT domains.

Elinext is an alliance of companies with international offices in the USA, Germany, France, Ireland, Singapore and Hong Kong and delivery centers in Poland, Georgia, Kazakhstan, Vietnam, and Uzbekistan.

Key partners: Broadcom, Siemens, TransPerfect, Volkswagen, Parrot and Trumpf.

- Improving system speed and performance with the latest technologies

- Running MTM operations efficiently and swiftly and generating reports complete with charts, graphs and diagrams

- Providing quick processing for a substantial amount of raw data such as transactions, commission calculations, report generation, etc.
- Enabling financial institutions to cater to their clients’ investment needs
- Tracking transactions along with relevant objects

Our team can develop ERP, CRM, ECM, WMS, LPM, and EHR systems tailored to your organization’s exact needs. We also offer web, mobile, desktop, and embedded software solutions as well as QA and testing services. We pride ourselves on providing highly skilled and trusted remote development teams for your projects.
